meaning: to serve as evidence for (an accusation etc); to reinforce (a percepti
sentence: 这份录音坐实了他撒谎的事实。
pinyin: Zhè fèn lùyīn zuòshí le tā sāhuǎng de shìshí.
english: This recording confirmed the fact that he lied.

sentence: 受害者鼓起勇气举报了性侵事件。
pinyin: Shòuhài zhě gǔ qǐ yǒngqì jǔbào le xìngqīn shìjiàn.
english: The victim gathered the courage to report the sexual assault.

sentence: 夕阳缓缓地沉入地平线。
pinyin: Xī yáng huǎn huǎn de chén rù dì píng xiàn.
english: The setting sun slowly sank below the horizon.

sentence: 贵的东西不见得就是好的。
pinyin: Guì de dōngxi bú jiàn de jiù shì hǎo de.
english: Expensive things aren't necessarily good.

sentence: 卧室里的灯光很柔和，让人感觉很放松。
pinyin: Wò shì lǐ de dēng guāng hěn róu hé, ràng rén gǎn jué hěn fàng sōng.
english: The lighting in the bedroom is very soft, making you feel very relaxed.

sentence: 他机智地回答了记者的刁钻问题。
pinyin: Tā jī zhì de huí dá le jì zhě de diāo zuān wèn tí.
english: He cleverly answered the reporter's tricky question.

meaning: This shows;thus it can be seen that
sentence: 他每天都来得很早，由此可见他很认真。
pinyin: Tā měi tiān dōu lái de hěn zǎo, yóucǐkějiàn tā hěn rènzhēn.
english: He arrives early every day — from this you can see he is very dedicated.

sentence: 站在草原上感受到无边的开阔。
pinyin: Zhàn zài cǎoyuán shang gǎnshòu dào wúbiān de kāikuò.
english: Standing on the grassland you feel boundless openness.

meaning: 1. to scrap; 2. to be written off
sentence: 这台电脑太旧了，只能报废处理。
pinyin: Zhè tái diànnǎo tài jiù le, zhǐ néng bàofèi chǔlǐ.
english: This computer is too old and can only be scrapped.

sentence: 手推车的一个轮子坏了。
pinyin: Shǒu tuī chē de yī ge lún zi huài le.
english: One of the wheels on the cart is broken.

sentence: 她唱歌时，弟弟用吉他伴奏。
pinyin: Tā chànggē shí, dìdi yòng jítā bàn zòu.
english: While she sang, her younger brother accompanied her on the guitar.

sentence: 她每天花一个小时烹调晚饭。
pinyin: Tā měi tiān huā yī gè xiǎoshí pēngtiáo wǎnfàn.
english: She spends an hour cooking dinner every day.

sentence: 孩子对这个新奇的玩具爱不释手。
pinyin: Háizi duì zhège xīnqí de wánjù ài bù shì shǒu.
english: The child can't put down this novel toy.

sentence: 她从小就梦想成为一名模特儿。
pinyin: Tā cóng xiǎo jiù mèng xiǎng chéng wéi yī míng mó tè ér.
english: She has dreamed of becoming a fashion model since she was little.

meaning: 1. to link up; 2. to thread together
sentence: 他学了十年，终于把这门技术融会贯通了。
pinyin: Tā xué le shí nián, zhōngyú bǎ zhè mén jìshù rónghùi guàn tōng le.
english: After studying for ten years, he finally achieved a thorough mastery of this skill.

meaning: 1. to travel around; 2. to roam; 3. (mobile telephony) roaming
sentence: 出国记得开通国际漫游服务。
pinyin: Chūguó jìde kāitōng guójì mànyóu fúwù.
english: Remember to activate international roaming when you go abroad.

meaning: 1. to lead troups; 2. (fig.) to lead; 3. leading
sentence: 她是这个行业的领军人物。
pinyin: Tā shì zhège hángyè de lǐngjūn rénwù.
english: She is a leading figure in this industry.

sentence: 你可以用手机App缴费。
pinyin: Nǐ kěyǐ yòng shǒujī App jiǎofèi.
english: You can pay fees using your phone's app.

sentence: 她买了一件橙色的外套。
pinyin: Tā mǎi le yī jiàn chéngsè de wàitào.
english: She bought an orange-colored jacket.

sentence: 交响乐团今晚在大剧院演出。
pinyin: Jiāoxiǎng yuètuán jīn wǎn zài dà jùyuàn yǎnchū.
english: The symphony orchestra is performing at the grand theatre tonight.

sentence: 消防员迅速赶到现场扑灭了火灾。
pinyin: Xiāofángyuán xùnsù gǎndào xiànchǎng pūmiè le huǒzāi.
english: Firefighters quickly arrived at the scene and put out the fire.

sentence: 这道题要求计算合格率的百分比。
pinyin: Zhè dào tí yāoqiú jìsuàn hégélǜ de bǎifēnbǐ.
english: This question asks you to calculate the percentage of the pass rate.

sentence: 她是一位美食网红，粉丝超过百万。
pinyin: Tā shì yī wèi měishí wǎnghóng, fěnsī chāoguò bǎi wàn.
english: She is a food influencer with over a million followers.

sentence: 这家工厂完成私有化后，效率提高了很多。
pinyin: Zhè jiā gōngchǎng wánchéng sīyǒuhuà hòu, xiàolǜ tígāo le hěn duō.
english: After this factory completed privatization, efficiency improved significantly.

sentence: 爸爸还在订有线电视，不想换流媒体。
pinyin: Bàba hái zài dìng yǒuxiàn diànshì, bù xiǎng huàn liú méitǐ.
english: Dad still subscribes to cable television and doesn't want to switch to streaming.

sentence: 她很喜欢看烹饪类的真人秀节目。
pinyin: Tā hěn xǐhuān kàn pēngrèn lèi de zhēnrénxiù jiémù.
english: She loves watching cooking reality shows.

sentence: 他大学选择了法医学专业。
pinyin: Tā dàxué xuǎnzé le fǎyīxué zhuānyè.
english: He chose forensic medicine as his university major.

sentence: 下周一是新学期选课的截止日期。
pinyin: Xià zhōuyī shì xīn xuéqī xuǎnkè de jiézhǐ rìqī.
english: Next Monday is the deadline for course selection for the new semester.

meaning: 1. configuration of rooms in a residence (e.g. 3BR 2 Bath)
sentence: 这套两室一厅的户型很适合小家庭。
pinyin: Zhè tào liǎng shì yī tīng de hùxíng hěn shìhé xiǎo jiātíng.
english: This two-bedroom, one-living-room floor plan is very suitable for a small family.

sentence: 医生给他开了一种复方感冒药。
pinyin: Yīshēng gěi tā kāi le yī zhǒng fùfāng gǎnmào yào.
english: The doctor prescribed him a compound cold medicine.

sentence: 这个游乐区专门为幼童设计的。
pinyin: Zhège yóulè qū zhuānmén wèi yòutóng shèjì de.
english: This play area is specially designed for young children.

sentence: 旅游业是这个小镇的主要财源。
pinyin: Lǚyóuyè shì zhège xiǎo zhèn de zhǔyào cáiyuán.
english: Tourism is the main source of revenue for this small town.

sentence: 他决定向朋友的餐厅入股。
pinyin: Tā juédìng xiàng péngyou de cāntīng rùgǔ.
english: He decided to invest in his friend's restaurant.

sentence: 孩子完成作业后，妈妈给了他奖赏。
pinyin: Háizi wánchéng zuòyè hòu, māma gěi le tā jiǎngshǎng.
english: After the child finished his homework, mom gave him a reward.

sentence: 这件事要花不少银子。
pinyin: Zhè jiàn shì yào huā bù shǎo yínzi.
english: This matter will cost a good deal of money.

sentence: 他很有幽默感，大家都喜欢和他聊天。
pinyin: Tā hěn yǒu yōumògǎn, dàjiā dōu xǐhuān hé tā liáotiān.
english: He has a great sense of humor; everyone loves chatting with him.

sentence: 这件外套只剩大码了，你要吗？
pinyin: Zhè jiàn wàitào zhǐ shèng dàmǎ le, nǐ yào ma?
english: This jacket only has large size left; do you want it?

meaning: 1. to fish out; 2. to take out (from a pocket, bag etc)
sentence: 他从口袋里掏出一把钥匙。
pinyin: Tā cóng kǒudài lǐ tāo chū yī bǎ yàoshi.
english: He fished a key out of his pocket.

meaning: 1. to coexist; 2. to get along (with others)
sentence: 室友之间要学会和平共处。
pinyin: Shìyǒu zhījiān yào xuéhuì hépíng gòngchǔ.
english: Roommates need to learn to coexist peacefully.

sentence: 警犬是社区安全的忠实卫士。
pinyin: Jǐngquǎn shì shèqū ānquán de zhōngshí wèishì.
english: Police dogs are faithful guardians of community safety.

sentence: 他是一位获奖无数的剧作家。
pinyin: Tā shì yī wèi huòjiǎng wúshù de jùzuòjiā.
english: He is a playwright who has won numerous awards.

meaning: 1. (of sb or sth) whole or entire body
sentence: 这只猫通体雪白，非常漂亮。
pinyin: Zhè zhī māo tōngtǐ xuě bái, fēicháng piàoliang.
english: This cat is snow-white all over its body and very beautiful.

meaning: 1. to draw; 2. to derive; 3. to absorb
sentence: 我们要善于汲取前人的经验。
pinyin: Wǒmen yào shànyú jíqǔ qiánrén de jīngyàn.
english: We should be good at drawing on the experience of those who came before us.

meaning: 1. to write comments on a report submitted by a subordinate; 2. writte
sentence: 领导已在报告上写了批示。
pinyin: Lǐngdǎo yǐ zài bàogào shàng xiě le pīshì.
english: The leader has already written comments on the report.

sentence: 这把刀是用不锈钢做的，不容易生锈。
pinyin: Zhè bǎ dāo shì yòng bùxiùgāng zuò de, bù róngyì shēng xiù.
english: This knife is made of stainless steel and doesn't rust easily.

meaning: 1. overhead; 2. elevated (walkway, highway etc); 3. elevated road
sentence: 走高架比走地面快二十分钟。
pinyin: Zǒu gāojià bǐ zǒu dìmiàn kuài èrshí fēnzhōng.
english: Taking the elevated road is twenty minutes faster than driving on surface streets.

meaning: 1. variant of 交匯|交汇; 2. to flow together; 3. confluence (of rivers, ai
sentence: 两条河在城市南边交汇。
pinyin: Liǎng tiáo hé zài chéngshì nánbiān jiāohuì.
english: The two rivers converge at the south side of the city.

meaning: 1. traditional form of Chinese, as opposed to simplified form 簡體|简体[ji
sentence: 香港和台湾使用的是繁体字。
pinyin: Xiānggǎng hé Táiwān shǐyòng de shì fántǐzì.
english: Hong Kong and Taiwan use traditional Chinese characters.

sentence: 这家餐厅的海产非常新鲜。
pinyin: Zhè jiā cāntīng de hǎichǎn fēicháng xīnxiān.
english: The seafood at this restaurant is very fresh.

sentence: 这个月油价浮动比较大。
pinyin: Zhège yuè yóujià fúdòng bǐjiào dà.
english: Oil prices have fluctuated quite a lot this month.
